name: codex-doctor
description: Diagnose why a Codex session is slow, expensive, or losing context.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose Codex session context, repeated work, and slow tools
interface.longDescription: Codex Doctor is a session-first diagnostic plugin. Invoke `$doctor dg` or `$doctor dg -c` inside a Codex session to inspect context growth, repeated work, slow tools, usage, and quota signals.
